prompt:
Goal: Create a cinematic luxury magazine-style celebrity profile collage for Jaxon Croft, presenting him as a rising Hollywood leading man with a polished, charismatic, fashion-forward persona.

Canvas: Wide horizontal editorial spread, 16:9 aspect ratio, dark moody lighting, premium print-magazine aesthetic, thin gold divider lines between panels, high-contrast photography, warm highlights, deep teal, black, cream, red carpet red, and metallic gold accents. The man’s face should be anonymized with a smooth rectangular blur or neutral face-obscuring block in every appearance.

Layout: Use exactly 8 visual sections: 1 large hero portrait on the left occupying about 40% of the width, 4 medium story panels in the center/right grid, and 3 narrow stacked detail panels on the far right.

Section 1, large left hero portrait: Full-body or three-quarter portrait of Jaxon Croft standing in an elegant dimly lit interior lounge or study, wearing a tailored teal three-piece suit, dark open-collar shirt, layered necklaces, pocket square, and luxury wristwatch. Add large editorial text at the top-left: “THE RISING STAR:” and below it in very large serif capitals: “JAXON CROFT”. Add smaller copy: “Nationally recognized magnetic charm, effortless style, charismatic gaze.” Add bottom-left caption: “Hollywood’s New Leading Man.”

Section 2, top center red carpet: Show him walking a red carpet premiere in Los Angeles, wearing a white dinner jacket, black shirt, black trousers, surrounded by photographers, flashes, velvet ropes, and movie posters. Text at top: “RED CARPET PREMIERE IN L.A.” Visible poster titles should include NEON DREAMS and METRO EXPRESS.

Section 3, top right on-set filming: Show him on a film set in Vancouver wearing a rugged leather jacket and jeans, speaking with a director beside bright studio lights and camera gear. Text at top: “ON-SET FILMING IN VANCOUVER.” Add bottom caption: “METHOD MEETS STYLE.”

Section 4, bottom center penthouse meeting: Show him standing inside a sleek New York penthouse or private screening room, wearing the teal suit again, flanked by red velvet ropes and framed film posters on the wall. Text at top: “PENTHOUSE MEETINGS IN NEW YORK”. Include the same two visible poster titles: “NEON DREAMS” and “METRO EXPRESS”.

Section 5, bottom right after-party: Show him at a sophisticated London premiere after-party on a rooftop terrace at night, holding a drink, wearing a brown blazer over a dark teal shirt, with the London skyline and tall illuminated skyscrapers in the background. Text at top: “PREMIERE AFTER-PARTY IN LONDON”. Add bottom caption: “GLOBAL PREMIERE TOUR”.

Far-right narrow column, exactly 3 stacked detail panels: Panel 6: a cropped portrait/detail of his styled hair and upper suit with text “HOLLYWOOD VIBES”. Panel 7: close-up of layered necklaces and open shirt collar with text “CURATED DETAILS”. Panel 8: close-up of an expensive mechanical wristwatch with text “CURATED DETAILS”.

Bottom-right magazine cover insert: Add a small overlapping magazine-cover thumbnail near the lower right edge showing the same man in a suit on a cover labeled GQ MAN, with cover line “JAXON CROFT THE NEW ERA”.

Typography and style: Elegant serif uppercase headlines in off-white and gold, magazine-cover hierarchy, cinematic paparazzi lighting, glossy editorial realism, slight film grain, sharp clothing textures, dramatic shadows, red carpet glamour, no cartoon style. Keep all text legible and use exactly the stated section titles and captions without adding extra panels.
